ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider assigned to the order */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle used for the ride */,
  "platform_type" INTEGER /* Type of platform used for the order (e.g., Mobile App, Web) */,
  "personal_or_business" TEXT /* Indicates if the order is personal or business */,
  "placement_day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the order was placed */,
  "placement_weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday (1=Monday) when the order was placed */,
  "placement_time" TEXT /* Time when the order was placed */,
  "confirmation_day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the order was confirmed */,
  "confirmation_weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday (1=Monday) when the order was confirmed */,
  "confirmation_time" TEXT /* Time when the order was confirmed */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time when the rider arrived at the pickup location */,
  "arrival_at_pickup_time" TEXT /* Time when the rider picked up the user */,
  "arrival_at_destination_time" TEXT /* Time when the rider arrived at the destination */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the ride in kilometers */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the ride */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters at the time of the ride */,
  "pickup_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "destination_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination location */,
  "destination_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination location */,
  "time_from_pickup_to_arrival" INTEGER /* Time taken from pickup to arrival at the destination in seconds */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "tip_amount" TEXT /* Tip amount added by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_temperature FOREIGN KEY ("temperature") REFERENCES weather ("temperature"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_pickup_latitude FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_latitude") REFERENCES locations ("latitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_precipitation_mm FOREIGN KEY ("precipitation_mm") REFERENCES weather ("precipitation_mm"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_destination_longitude FOREIGN KEY ("destination_longitude") REFERENCES locations ("longitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_pickup_longitude FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_longitude") REFERENCES locations ("longitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_destination_latitude FOREIGN KEY ("destination_latitude") REFERENCES locations ("latitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_platform_type FOREIGN KEY ("platform_type") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Status in the loyalty program (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points earned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "rider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the rider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the rider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the rider */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle the rider uses (e.g., Bike, Scooter, Car) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rider account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the rider's last login */,
  "rider_rating" TEXT /* Average rating given by users to the rider */,
  "rides_completed" INTEGER /* Number of rides completed by the rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Bike, Scooter, Car) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., Available, In Use, Maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date and time of the last maintenance */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle in kilometers per liter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Mobile App, Web) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the record */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters at the time of the record */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the status change is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Confirmed, In Transit, Completed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the status change */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was created */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Pickup, Destination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rider_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the rating is associated with */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider who provided the rating */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rider_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the rider (1-5) */,
  "user_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "rider_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the rider */,
  "rating_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rider_ratings_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rider_ratings_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rider_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percent" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_promotions" (
  "order_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order promotion */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the promotion is associated with */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the order */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
